textByHashes.8a36f5ba90b1982bc1d05408fa4b07851425f68a: Well, it's funny you should ask that actually, I run the local parcel service to the mainland.
textByHashes.21e9a756926dfe2b61af5f8e09afdcbfec37c5ec: Yes, we sometimes get asked to send items back to the mainland. We can send items to individuals' bank accounts, for a small fee of course.
textByHashes.8412c6b96b3b01df0882fa5774d64fad7ccb2a4f: It costs 10 trading sticks per item, unfortunately, even stackable items cost the same.
textByHashes.bb956dd2d2ca4e796bed76f3290770d0e1f6fb4e: Trading sticks are our local currency, you could perhaps earn some trading sticks by doing some work around the village.
textByHashes.58c837fe5546a79f79472e0d1ebe3742ad2577af: Have a chat with Murcaily, I think he was looking for someone to help him, he works near the hardwood grove to the east of Trufitus' hut.
textByHashes.6f4c1cd441f68ebd5c621efb25bff9fd28175a3f: It costs at least 10 trading sticks to use this service. Sorry but you don't have enough.
textByHashes.3e31308340d44370b7c38a9f9a5bc0d396a785fd: Of course...which items would you like to send to your bank?
textByHashes.91a3d2f5151113a19a0e2ad6baff978959ee3c32: Yeah, you've been doing a lot of good work around here. Let me give you something for your time and effort.
textByHashes.b83d3464c69329161796f8656b2d211eb243f377: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?
textByHashes.94a10bd81490cf59f028dd56118b7c3aa72d32bc: Hey, I've seen you working around the village. You've been doing a lot of good work around here for us. Let me give you something for your trouble.
textByHashes.5a325a16fb45cd32a622307ce68e177cd3e3b0e6: Ahhhhhhhh - Get away from me you beast!
textByHashes.11e2876e9377ff11371b847dbb06d46c68585c41: Waahhhhh! - It's da evil broodoo beast come ta eat my very soul!
